market_brief.AMZN: Big Spring Sale concluded; market sentiment balancing AI capex/spending concerns against long-term AWS/AI growth potential.
market_brief.INTC: New Core Ultra Series 3 launch driving OEM (Dell/HP) adoption; ongoing supply constraints leading to CPU price adjustments.
market_brief.AAPL: 50th anniversary period; record services revenue; strong Q1 performance with product-heavy 2026 outlook; continued focus on AI/WWDC catalysts.
